title: Snowfall's Mace Essentials
description: The Essentials to Minecraft Mace PVP.
body:
## Snowfall's Mace Essentials

> A clean texture pack built specifically for Mace PVP.

---

[![Available on CurseForge](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-CurseForge-1f0f0f?style=for-the-badge&logo=curseforge&logoColor=orange)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/snowfalls-mace-essentials)

[![Available on Planet Minecraft](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available%20on-Planet%20Minecraft-0d1b2a?style=for-the-badge&logo=pa&logoColor=orange)](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/snowfall-s-mace-essentials/)

---

### What this pack is made for
This pack is designed mainly for Mace PVP and focuses on nice visuals, clean textures, and reducing distractions during fights.

---

### Features
• Low Fire  
• Side and Low Shield  
• Small Totem  
• Small Totem Pop  
• No Explosion Particles  
• Small Totem  
• Small Totem Pop  
• Custom Mace Textures for Breach and Density (Requires Variants-CIT Mod)  
• Unobstructive Particles (Wind Charge, Firework, Potion etc.)  
And EVEN MORE!

---

### Why use this pack?
• Regular updates  
• Less visual clutter  
• Made for MacePVP  

---

## Support
Found a bug in the pack or have a suggestion?  
Message me on Discord: @snowyfalling
